item.description:
What's new in Sonault 1.6.0

  • Import only the section you need from a link: expand Only need part of it? in the import popup, enter From/To times, and download just that clip (up to 10 minutes) without fetching the full video first.
  • Timecode fields now insert colons as you type, so 1234 becomes 12:34.
  • Range fields show inline validation as soon as both times are entered, and the Download button stays disabled until the selection is valid.
  • Fixed the floating Import button lagging or flickering when moving the window between displays or Spaces.
